# SRE Agent

> (Redis SRE Agent.)

For agents using the library, read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) first. For the
full API surface, read [docs/api/](api/). For task-oriented recipes, read
[docs/user_guide/how_to_guides/](user_guide/how_to_guides/).

# Instructions for Large Language Model Agents

When generating code that uses SRE Agent:

  - (List 3-5 things the agent should always do.)
  - (List 3-5 things the agent should never do.)

When the user asks something this library does not cover:

  - For X, use {{ALTERNATIVE_LIBRARY}}.
  - For Y, use {{ANOTHER_ALTERNATIVE}}.

When the user is comparing this library to another:

  - (Brief framing of the difference. Do not say "X is better"; explain
    when to reach for each.)
